no. of videos in 2024: SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM youtube_videos_staging WHERE timestamp >= '2024-01-01T00:00:00Z' AND timestamp < '2025-01-01T00:00:00Z'
average views in united states: SELECT AVG(views) AS avg_views FROM youtube_videos_staging WHERE region = 'US'
which countries are watching our videos: SELECT region, SUM(views) AS sum_views FROM youtube_videos_staging GROUP BY region ORDER BY SUM(views) DESC
which region has the most views?: SELECT region, SUM(views) AS sum_views FROM youtube_videos_staging GROUP BY region ORDER BY SUM(views) DESC
views v/s sentiments: SELECT AVG(views) AS avg_views, AVG(sentiment_score) AS avg_sentiment_score FROM youtube_videos_staging
video per category: SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS count FROM youtube_videos_staging GROUP BY category
distribution of videos across categories: SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS count FROM youtube_videos_staging GROUP BY category
top 5 categories by views: SELECT category, SUM(views) AS sum_views FROM youtube_videos_staging GROUP BY category ORDER BY SUM(views) DESC LIMIT 5
show percetage of videos in each categor: SELECT category, SUM(views) * 100.0 / SUM(SUM(views)) OVER() AS percent FROM youtube_videos_staging GROUP BY category
which category should we priortize if we: SELECT category, SUM(views) AS sum_views FROM youtube_videos_staging GROUP BY category ORDER BY SUM(views) DESC
likes per view: SELECT SUM(likes) * 1.0 / NULLIF(SUM(views),0) AS ratio FROM youtube_videos_staging
average views in india for educational v: SELECT AVG(views) AS avg_views FROM youtube_videos_staging WHERE region = 'IN' AND category = 'Education'
